name: micromongo
description: Mongodb-like queries over standard arrays of objects

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:bundles
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:all
scripts.build:docs: npm run build:bundles && node scripts/build-docs-site.js && node scripts/gen-docs-examples.js
scripts.gen-docs: npm run gen-compat-tables && npm run build:docs
scripts._npm-audit:
npm audit || echo '
*** Please check warnings above ***
' && npm audit --production --audit-level high && echo '
*** npm audit reported no high-level vulnerabilities for production configuration ***
'
scripts._deps-update: echo '* Updating packages versions... '; npm-check-updates -u --upgradeAll --error-level 1 && npm install
scripts._check-changes: echo '* Checking if git directory is clean... '; bash -c '[[ -z $(git status -uno --porcelain) ]]'
scripts.update-deps: npm run _check-changes && npm run _deps-update && npm test && git commit -am 'updated deps'
scripts.pretest: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run inspect && npm run _npm-audit && npm run _deps-check
scripts.test:bundles: npm run build:bundles && node bundle-tests/esm-smoke.mjs && node bundle-tests/browser-iife-smoke.cjs && node bundle-tests/dual-package.mjs && node bundle-tests/treeshake-guard.mjs && node bundle-tests/core-smoke.mjs
scripts._test: nyc ./node_modules/mocha/bin/_mocha -- --recursive -R spec ./test/ && npm run test-types && npm run test:bundles
scripts.commit-and-push: npm run _commit && npm test && npm run _push
scripts.patch-release: npm test && npm run _patch-release && npm run _push
scripts.minor-release: npm test && npm run _minor-release && npm run _push
scripts.__major-release: npm test && npm run _major-release && npm run _push

author: Alexander <alykoshin@gmail.com>
